zh.lifeSummary: Lord Wilson Upton於1343年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可拉文哈姆。他於1370年與Lady Bertina Kent在英國英格蘭素福爾可拉文哈姆結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1395年在英國英格蘭戴文牛頓 布謝爾享年52歲。

nameMeanings.name: Upton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places in England called Upton, most of which are named with Old English upp ‘upper’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some have different origins, such as one in Essex, originally named with the phrase upp in tūne ‘up in the settlement’, i.e. the higher part of the settlement, and Upton Lovell (Wiltshire), which derives from the Old English personal name Ubba + Old English tūn. This name was brought to Ireland (Antrim) in 1598 by Henry Upton, from Upton in Devon.

variants.name: Uptain
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of English   Upton  .

nameMeanings.name: Lord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Lorraine   or variant spelling of   Laurie .

variants.name: Lorraine
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin denoting a migrant from the province of Lorraine in eastern France. This derives its name from Latin Lotharingia ‘territory of the people of Lothar’. The latter is a Germanic personal name derived from hlud ‘fame’ + heri, hari ‘army’. Lorraine began to be used as a girl's name in Scotland in the 19th century, and for a time in the second half of the 20th century enjoyed great popularity, which has since waned.

nameMeanings.name: Wilson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin a patronymic from   Will .  Use as a given name in the United States was inspired by President (Thomas) Woodrow Wilson (  1856–1924 );  compare the similar adoption as a given name of  Woodrow .

en.lifeSummary: Lord Wilson Upton was born in 1343, in Lavenham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. He married Lady Bertina Kent in 1370, in Lavenham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1395, in Newton Bushel, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52.

Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1395, à Newton Bushel, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Wilson Uptonは1343年にイギリスイギリススフォルクラベンハムで生まれた。1370年にイギリスイギリススフォルクラベンハムでLady Bertina Kentと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1395年にイギリスイギリスデボンニュートン ブシェルで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Wilson Upton(은)는 1343년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 레이븐함에서 태어났다. 그는 1370년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 레이븐함에서 Lady Bertina Kent(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1395년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 뉴턴 부셸에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.
